purpose: explicit production harness failure path for when real push credentials are unavailable: the executor must fail fast before remote mutation with a missing-secret error instead of silently falling back to lab-only auth

required_inputs: push signing secret or application password

explicit_missing_secret_error.message: production push credentials are missing; provide the real push secret or application password before running preflight, dry-run, or apply

required_invariants: production push must fail fast when the real push secret is missing
the error must be explicit and block preflight, dry-run, and apply before any remote mutation
the missing-secret path must not silently fall back to lab-only HMAC or application-password behavior
the same one-remote, one-local, one-drift topology still defines the harness even when credentials are absent
browser-visible inspection stays on the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress through a local-only proxy
